decision: Keep release-grade live-detector-evidence gate at warning. Rebuilt Linux smoke now passes UA, UA-CH fullVersionList on SannySoft, BrowserLeaks Client Hints, Pixelscan fingerprint-check, iphey, BrowserScan, and CreepJS, webdriver, locale/timezone, screen, storage quota, hardware, WebGL configured values, and repeat-consistent sanitized Canvas 2D probe hashes, captures unscored WebAudio and FontFaceSet probes, and now records bounded BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan Permissions API plus feature-availability probes. Full headed/proxy BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft matrix remains incomplete. Local macOS arm64 host headless SannySoft evidence now records a non-release warning that host Chrome still exposes HeadlessChrome; it improves macOS gap visibility but does not satisfy headed/native release coverage.

surfaces.evidence: Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke using fingerprint.user_agent config reported navigator.webdriver=false and configured Chromium UA without HeadlessChrome.

Rebuilt packaged Linux runtime passed SannySoft/CDP UA-CH smoke, BrowserLeaks Client Hints page smoke in headless and headed Docker/Xvfb modes, Pixelscan fingerprint-check UA-CH smoke in headless and headed Docker/Xvfb modes, BrowserScan UA-CH smoke in headless and headed Docker/Xvfb modes, iphey UA-CH smoke, and CreepJS UA-CH smoke in headless and headed Docker/Xvfb modes. Observed navigator.userAgentData platform=Linux, platformVersion=6.8.0, architecture=x86, bitness=64, mobile=false, model empty, wow64=false, and fullVersionList containing Chromium 150.0.7871.101.
SannySoft local dogfood rerun observed MacIntel platform on macOS host; release-grade cross-platform persona coherence remains unproven.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported Intl timezone Asia/Taipei with wrapper TZ propagation plus renderer switch propagation.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported zh-TW, zh;q=0.9, en;q=0.8 language list.
Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke collected by scripts/detector_harness.py reported screen 1920x1080, available screen 1920x1040, and DPR=1 from configured fingerprint profile.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported hardwareConcurrency=8 and deviceMemory=8 from configured fingerprint profile.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP collector rendered a deterministic 64x32 Canvas 2D probe twice from fresh container launches with fingerprint.canvas_noise=23; sanitized data_url_sha256 and image_data_sha256 matched across repeats, and no raw data URL or pixel payload is committed.

Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke and BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS page-context collectors reported the configured Intel Inc. / Intel Iris OpenGL Engine debug vendor/renderer strings. The shared collector now escapes embedded SDP newlines correctly, so passed Linux headless BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft evidence records sanitized extension count, extension hash, bounded parameter hash, shader precision hash, rendered pixel hash, and pixel dimensions. detector-score-comparison.json now records a passing BrowserLeaks-vs-BrowserScan WebGL metadata cross-detector comparison and ignores warning-only non-release WebGL rows for release metadata gaps; headed/native detector confirmation remains a blocker.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke, BrowserLeaks JavaScript Web Audio page headless/headed Docker evidence, Pixelscan headed page-status hash evidence, plus BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan bounded page-context probes render deterministic OfflineAudioContext length 44100 at sampleRate 44100 and record sanitized sum/sumAbs/first-sample summaries. BrowserLeaks JavaScript exposes AudioContext fields but no numeric score; committed headless/headed field comparison passes. CreepJS comparison shows freq/gain/sum/time/unique match across headless/headed evidence, with drift isolated to trap. Source patch now gates AudioBuffer noise to dense non-uniform buffers so sparse/uniform CreepJS trap probes keep native mutation semantics; rebuilt runtime and live CreepJS rerun remain required.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke plus BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS page-context collectors reported document.fonts.check availability for sampled desktop font families. BrowserLeaks Fonts headless and headed Docker/Xvfb page evidence plus CreepJS page context record bounded font metric rows plus aggregate glyph and metrics SHA-256 values; knowledge/manifests/detector-score-comparison.json now reports matching BrowserLeaks headless/headed sampled font list, candidate count, glyph SHA, and metrics SHA, reports matching BrowserLeaks/CreepJS sampled font list/candidate count/glyph SHA with differing metric SHA, and records a passing Pixelscan headless-vs-headed font availability comparison. BrowserLeaks/CreepJS/Pixelscan detector score baselines and native platform font corpus parity remain required.

CreepJS local dogfood smoke after WebRTC prefs/flag showed host connection blocked, foundation/ip unsupported/blocked, and stun connection blocked; no candidate IP literal was committed. BrowserLeaks WebRTC now has committed headless and headed Docker/Xvfb sanitized ICE candidate metadata, candidate type labels, public/private IP-literal counts, and a passing headless-vs-headed bounded comparison without committing raw addresses. External proxy/geolocation detector evidence is still required.

SannySoft local dogfood rerun reported Permissions prompt and HEADCHR_PERMISSIONS ok. The shared Linux collector now records bounded BrowserLeaks and Pixelscan page-context Permissions API states plus feature-availability booleans (Contacts Manager, Content Index, Network Information, storage buckets, WebHID/Serial/USB, etc.) without requesting device access; broader CreepJS/iphey/BrowserScan release-matrix permissions coverage remains incomplete.
Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke collected by scripts/detector_harness.py reported navigator.storage.estimate quota 8589934592 bytes for configured 8192 MiB storage quota.

Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP, BrowserLeaks, Pixelscan, iphey, BrowserScan, and CreepJS page-context collectors reported navigator.webdriver=false; SannySoft, BrowserLeaks, Pixelscan, BrowserScan, and CreepJS have headed Docker/Xvfb evidence. CreepJS detector metrics reported 0% headless and 0% stealth with 19% like-headless in both headless and headed Docker runs. A macOS arm64 local host headless SannySoft collector additionally recorded navigator.webdriver=false but a HeadlessChrome UA token, so macOS headless host remains warning evidence only.

Packaged Linux BrowserLeaks Client Hints smoke executed with Chromium configured for --proxy-server=<loopback-http-proxy>; the committed local CONNECT proxy observer summary recorded BrowserLeaks HTTPS tunnel traffic through the proxy. BrowserLeaks WebRTC collection now flags sanitized candidate IP literal counts, but no external proxy exit-IP/geolocation detector run has been executed.
BrowseForge dogfood used distinct profile IDs and isolated same-origin localStorage across two sessions.

Linux x64 Docker SannySoft, BrowserLeaks, Pixelscan, BrowserScan, and CreepJS smokes now exist in both headless and headed/Xvfb display modes, in addition to macOS dogfood; Windows and native headed Linux/macOS detector matrix remains absent.
